title: The No-Nonsense Guide to How to Sell Ebooks from Kenya — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling digital products from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, or Bangladesh is possible with crypto-native infrastructure that has no geographic restrictions.

content.text: You're a Kenyan digital creator struggling to sell ebooks due to PayPal restrictions. Every time you try to set up a payment gateway, you hit a roadblock. You've tried Stripe, but it's not available in your country either. You're not alone – many creators from Kenya, Ghana, Nigeria, and other countries face similar challenges. It's time to break free from these limitations and start receiving payments for your ebooks without any hassle. In this guide, we'll show you a step-by-step process to sell ebooks from Kenya, no PayPal required.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The traditional payment gateways like PayPal and Stripe are not designed for creators from restricted countries. They have strict regulations and verification processes that often lead to account closures. In contrast, blockchain-based payment systems like NOWPayments don't require KYC or buyer accounts, making it easy for creators like you to receive payments. With Unchained Commerce, you can set up a payment pipeline that's reliable, secure, and compliant with global standards. Our Full Stack Bundle provides everything you need to start selling ebooks from Kenya without any restrictions.
What You Need Before You Start

To get started, you'll need a digital product (in this case, an ebook), a payment processor like NOWPayments, and a delivery system that can automate the process. You'll also need to understand the basics of blockchain technology and how it can be used for payments. Don't worry if you're not tech-savvy – our setup process is designed to be user-friendly. You can focus on creating high-quality ebooks while we handle the technical aspects.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

Setting up your payment pipeline is a straightforward process. First, you'll need to create an account with NOWPayments and integrate it with your Unchained Commerce Full Stack Bundle. This will allow you to receive payments in multiple cryptocurrencies and fiat currencies. Next, you'll need to set up a delivery system that can automate the process of delivering your ebook to customers. Our Admin Dashboard provides real-time analytics and transaction logs, making it easy to track your sales and revenue.
Blockchain-based payments are the future of e-commerce, and Unchained Commerce is at the forefront of this revolution.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once you've set up your payment pipeline and delivery system, it's time to go live. You can create a sales page for your ebook and share it with your audience. When a customer makes a purchase, our system will automatically deliver the ebook and send a receipt to the customer. It's a seamless process that requires minimal effort on your part. You can focus on promoting your ebook and growing your sales while we handle the technical aspects.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

As your sales grow, you can scale your payment pipeline and delivery system to handle the increased traffic. Our Full Stack Bundle provides real-time analytics and transaction logs, making it easy to track your sales and revenue. You can also use our Admin Dashboard to manage your orders and customer support. With Unchained Commerce, you can focus on growing your business while we handle the technical aspects.
How can creators in Africa sell digital products internationally?

The most practical path for creators in restricted countries is a combination of NOWPayments for payment processing and USDT on Tron for the primary payment coin. USDT is a stable coin pegged to the US dollar, which means your revenue does not fluctuate with crypto market movements. Tron network fees are under one dollar, and settlement takes under 60 seconds. Once you receive USDT in your wallet, you convert to local currency through P2P exchanges — Binance P2P, Paxful, or local platforms specific to your country. The conversion typically takes 20-30 minutes and costs 2-5% of the transaction, which is significantly less than PayPal's international transfer fees or Western Union's rates. This is the complete payment flow that thousands of creators in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, and Bangladesh are using right now.
Our Full Stack Bundle provides a comprehensive solution for digital creators who want to sell ebooks from restricted countries.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're interested in exploring other payment options, you may want to consider blockchain-based platforms like BitPay or CoinPayments. Our Full Stack Bundle is designed to work seamlessly with these platforms, making it easy to expand your payment options. With Unchained Commerce, you can break free from PayPal and Stripe limitations and start receiving payments in multiple cryptocurrencies and fiat currencies.
Your Action Checklist

To get started, follow these concrete action steps: (1) Create an account with NOWPayments and integrate it with your Unchained Commerce Full Stack Bundle; (2) Set up a delivery system that can automate the process of delivering your ebook to customers; (3) Create a sales page for your ebook and share it with your audience; (4) Track your sales and revenue using our Admin Dashboard; (5) Focus on promoting your ebook and growing your sales.
With Unchained Commerce, you can break free from PayPal and Stripe limitations and start receiving payments in multiple cryptocurrencies and fiat currencies.
